title: SharkoCraft
body:
A Vanilla/oCd-inspired resource pack designed to smooth out the feel of Vanilla Minecraft. Available in 16x. ![SharkoCraft logo (not used in game)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ecc820a8a12531955053194bfdc4c9ef461a65e.png) **Features:** - Smoother textures - Seamless glass connections - New font - Solid colored blocks (for concrete and terracotta) ...and more! Stay tuned for more updates. Q&A: - **Q: Which version?**
As said in the tags: 1.20.4 only (for now?) - **Q: Any mod(loader)s required?**
No. - **Q: Do you plan on backporting it to version x?**
Not yet, as I'm still working on it. **LICENSING:** You may backport this resource pack to older versions for personal use. You may also feature it in your YouTube videos (though credit with a link this specific listing would be appreciated). You may not redistribute it w/o my permission.
